name: internet-blocker
description: Lightweight Electron app to block internet on a timer, schedule, or on demand — Windows and macOS
author: Sridhar Satuloori (https://github.com/Sridhar-Satuloori)

extendInfo.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Internet Blocker uses your location to display the name of your Wi-Fi network in Network Speed tests.
